name: Siasun Robot&Automation Co.,Ltd.
summary: Siasun Robot&Automation Co.,Ltd. operates in robotic industry in China. It offers collaborative, mobile, intelligent, industrial, and service robots; chassis marriage and assembly AGV, spot welding, and intelligent logistic systems; AS/RS systems; electronics assembly systems; automated vertical warehouse systems; and automated charging and swapping systems. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenyang, China.
